name: Contra Bota Fogos
preceding_figure_names: Maypole (Continuous Volta Spot Turn to R and L), Roundabout (to R and L), Shadow Traveling Volta
following_figure_names: Foot Change 6, Foot Change 7, Roundabout (to R and L)
notes:
Contra Bota Fogos may be danced with hand changes as: (when danced as this, the figure is usually repeated, regain normal hold on last step.)
Start with R to R hand hold (achieved at end of previous figure)
Change to L to L hand hold on step 3
Change to R to R hand hold on step 6.

steps.action: RF fwd towards Lady's R side in R Contra Position
comments: Slight pressure with R hand to lead Lady fwd
LF back and slightly to side without weight. Toe turned out. | 1/4 to R over steps 2, 3 | I/E of T (Pressure)

steps.action: RF fwd towards Man's R side in R Contra Position
comments: LF back and slightly to side without weight. Toe turned out | 1/4 to R over steps 2, 3 | I/E of T (Pressure)

steps.action: Take minimal weight to LF and replace weight to RF in L Contra Position
comments: Slightly extend hold over steps 5 and 6
1: LF fwd towards Lady's L side in L Contra Position | Slight pressure with R hand to lead Lady fwd, returning arms to normal position

steps.action: Take minimal weight to LF and replace weight to RF in L Contra Position
comments: 1: LF fwd towards Man's L side in L Contra Position | No turn | BF
a: RF back and slightly to side without weight. Toe turned out | 1/4 to L over steps 5, 6 | I/E of T (Pressure)
2: Take minimal weight to RF and replace weight to LF in R Contra Position, having moved it slightly back | BF
